revision.comment: Protected Template:Country data Australia: high use [edit=autoconfirmed:move=sysop]
transittion complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
update for women's football team using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
add link for field hockey teams
update to use new documentation method using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Country data Australia]]": high-risk template [edit=sysop:move=sysop]

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template}}</noinclude>
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}}
| alias = Australia
| flag alias = Flag of Australia.svg
| flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Australia.svg
| link alias-naval = Royal Australian Navy
| flag alias-air force = Ensign of the Royal Australian Air Force.svg
| link alias-air force = Royal Australian Air Force
| link alias-football = Australia {{{mw|}}} national football (soccer) team
| link alias-field hockey = {{#ifeq:{{{mw}}}|women's|Hockeyroos|Australia national field hockey team}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
| altlink = {{{altlink|}}}
| altvar = {{{altvar|}}}
| variant = {{{variant|}}}
<noinclude>
| redir1 = AUS
| related1 = Australasia
</noinclude>
}}<noinclude>
[[af:Sjabloon:Landdata Australië]]
[[ml:ഫലകം:Country data Australia]]
[[sl:Predloga:Podatki države Avstralija]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: remove unnecessary protection template already in [[Template:Country showdata]] using [[Project:AutoWikiBrowser|AWB]]
